findings.title: Pre-closeout implemented status is correct, not a defect
findings.rationale: HERMES_GATE_TENANT_SCOPE_POLICY, registry aggregate status, and contract current_subphase were correctly implemented or pending at C00 review time before review-result, adjudication, construction inspection, and final validation promotion.
findings.recommendation: No action; promote only after C00 review, adjudication, construction inspection, and final validation rerun.

findings.title: Frozen S01 layout still lists S02/S03 under futureModelSubphases
findings.rationale: HERMES_GATE_PACKAGE_LAYOUT is a frozen S01 record that still enumerates later model subphases. The label is historical and does not affect scope or correctness.
findings.recommendation: No action required; by-design frozen record.

findings.title: Cumulative fixture top-level subphase_id remains at layout origin
findings.rationale: The fixture top-level subphase_id remains RP00.P01.M00.S01 while per-slice subrecords bind their own subphase IDs, including hermes_gate_tenant_scope for RP00.P01.M03.S03.
findings.recommendation: No action required; consistent with cumulative-fixture pattern.

parsed_review.summary: PASS. RP00.P01.M03.S03 implements only the HermesGate tenant scope field. HERMES_GATE_TENANT_SCOPE_POLICY enforces required tenant_id, lfos_ prefix, canonical lowercase snake-case pattern, same-tenant invariant, cross_tenant_hermes_gate_scope_denied, forbidden forms, no_real_data=true, writesProductState=false, and nextSubphase RP00.P01.M03.S04. normalizeHermesGateTenantId, validateHermesGateTenantId, and assertHermesGateTenantScope fail closed for noncanonical, stored-whitespace, and cross-tenant contexts. The registry exposes hermesGateTenantScopePolicy while keeping HermesGate future-only with implementedSubphase=null. Scope boundaries hold: no Matter trace, lifecycle enum, ownership metadata, relationship map, field registry, state transition map, validation helper, factory, or full HermesGate model is present. Prior slices remain production_ready. No real data or product-state writes are present. No P0/P1/P2 findings.

raw_review_excerpt: overall_verdict=PASS; blocks_subphase_closeout=false; blocks_goal_closeout=false; findings=P3_NOTE only; no P0/P1/P2 findings.
